channel.title: GitHub Mathematica Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Mathematica in GitHub

item.title: Autodesk/maya-usd
item.description: A common USD (Universal Scene Description) plugin for Autodesk Maya

item.title: Unity-Technologies/com.unity.multiplayer.samples.bitesize
item.description: A collection of smaller Bitesize samples to educate in isolation features of Netcode for GameObjects and related technologies.
